metadata.description: Log Analytics workspace name connected to Microsoft Sentinel.
Published Azure Template Spec name for the BitSight Risk Findings connection template.
Provider/publisher name shown in Microsoft Sentinel.

connectorUiConfig.title: BitSight Risk Findings (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
BitSight reduced-scope connector built on **Microsoft Sentinel Codeless Connector Framework (CCF)**.

This package focuses only on selected BitSight risk findings for the following monitoring factors:

- Botnet Infections
- Spam Propagation
- Malware Servers
- Unsolicited Communications
- Potentially Exploited
- TLS/SSL Certificates
- Patching Cadence
- Mobile Software
- Open Ports
- File Sharing

The connector initially ingests only **WARN** and **BAD** findings. **FAIR** can be added later if required.

Each **Connect** action deploys one monitored BitSight company (GUID + display name) and creates one polling connection per monitored risk vector. Re-run **Connect** for additional companies.

sampleQueries.query: BitsightRiskFindings_CL | sort by TimeGenerated desc | take 20

sampleQueries.description: Current active warn and bad findings
sampleQueries.query: BitsightRiskFindings_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by finding_uid | where normalized_risk_state in ('warn','bad') | project TimeGenerated, company_name, risk_vector_label, normalized_risk_state, severity, severity_category, first_seen, last_seen | order by TimeGenerated desc

BitsightRiskFindings_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by finding_uid | where normalized_risk_state in ('warn','bad') | summarize Findings=count() by risk_vector_label, normalized_risk_state | order by Findings desc

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and write permissions are required.

customs.name: BitSight API token
customs.description: A valid BitSight API token is required.

customs.name: BitSight company GUID
customs.description: Provide the exact BitSight company GUID to monitor.

instructionSteps.title: Connect BitSight risk findings to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description: Provide the BitSight API token, one BitSight company GUID, and a display name. The connector will deploy a single table, one DCE, one DCR, and ten RestApiPoller connections for the selected risk vectors.
